name: FctsIdsPrmRateCatExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: SELECT PDRT_CK, PDRC_MODIFIER, PDRC_SEX_CD, PDRC_SMOKER_CD, PDRC_EFF_DT, PDRC_TERM_DT, PDRA_REF_DTM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_FacetsOwner}.CMC_PDRC_RATE_CAT

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2005, 2006, 2007 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 

Job Name :  FctsIdsPrmRateCatExtr

                           
PROCESSING:
    Pulls the Premium Rating infromation that is used to populate the IDS Premium Rateing table within the Premium Rating Model. 
   Dates are not used as a criteria for which records are pulled.   The whole table is extracted.
